scope: All actionable elements across all pages

shared_components.usage: Search filter with 500ms debounce on all list pages
Column header sort toggle, accepts column and sortBy props
Page navigation with page, perPage, count, gotoPage
Destructive action confirmation with onConfirm callback
Multi-field dialogs (create adjustment, credit note, etc.)
Flyout panels (item discount, transaction discount, printer, sync)
react-hook-form field wrapper, uses name prop for targeting

elements.label: Clear search (X icon)
elements.selector: svg X icon inside InputGroup, onClick={clearFilter}

elements.label: Edit location (pencil icon)
elements.selector: Per-row secondary button, navigates to edit

elements.label: Update Tax Rate
elements.selector: Button with Plus icon, navigates to add

elements.label: Add Category
elements.selector: Button with Plus icon, navigates to add

pages.title: Approval Config
pages.notes: Per transaction type row (purchase_order, supplier_return, transfer, stock_adjustment)

elements.label: Expand/Collapse row
elements.selector: Toggle ChevronRight/ChevronDown to show Before/After JSON

elements.label: Add Item
elements.selector: Plus icon, disabled until supplier selected

elements.label: Drop Cash
elements.selector: Small button in shift area, DollarSign/down icon

elements.label: Exit POS
elements.selector: Top right, LogOut icon, navigates to /console/dashboard

elements.label: Search products/barcode
elements.selector: data-testid="pos-search", placeholder="Search products or scan barcode...", autoFocus

elements.label: Toggle View (grid/list)
elements.selector: Icon button, List or Grid3X3 icon

elements.label: Pay Full ({method})
elements.selector: One per payment method, pays remaining balance

elements.label: Unlock
elements.selector: type="submit", disabled if empty password or loading
